name: Backup Supabase AGN - Full Schemas v2

parameters.query: SELECT s AS schema_name, public.export_full_backup(s) AS sql_content FROM unnest(ARRAY['ford-vendedor','hyundai-posventa','hyundai-ventas','marcas_chinas_schema','nissan-posventa','nissan-vendedor','ovalo-cobranzas','public']) AS s;

SELECT s AS schema_name, public.export_full_backup(s) AS sql_content FROM unnest(ARRAY['ford-vendedor','hyundai-posventa','hyundai-ventas','marcas_chinas_schema','nissan-posventa','nissan-vendedor','ovalo-cobranzas','public']) AS s;
